description: Structured Category for the Fantasy Treasure Event Crafter Situation. Roll when your PC finds a treasure. Minor Treasures scale from mundane items to minor magic items as Progress Points increase. From Mythic Magazine #62.

descriptionTranslations.en: Structured Category for the Fantasy Treasure Event Crafter Situation. Roll when your PC finds a treasure. Minor Treasures scale from mundane items to minor magic items as Progress Points increase. From Mythic Magazine #62.

entries.description: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

descriptionTranslations.en: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

entries.description: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

descriptionTranslations.en: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

entries.description: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

descriptionTranslations.en: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

entries.description: A piece of non-magical armor: shield, helmet, full set of armor, or a piece of armor.

descriptionTranslations.en: A piece of non-magical armor: shield, helmet, full set of armor, or a piece of armor.

entries.description: Roll on Meaning Tables to interpret what the treasure is.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Meaning Tables to interpret what the treasure is.

entries.description: A non-magical weapon: sword, battle axe, dagger, or similar.

descriptionTranslations.en: A non-magical weapon: sword, battle axe, dagger, or similar.

entries.description: Money, but not a lot. A couple of gold pieces, a small bag of silver coins, or a small chest with assorted currencies.

descriptionTranslations.en: Money, but not a lot. A couple of gold pieces, a small bag of silver coins, or a small chest with assorted currencies.

entries.description: Gems and precious stones, but not much. There may only be one and of suspect quality.

descriptionTranslations.en: Gems and precious stones, but not much. There may only be one and of suspect quality.

entries.description: Something semi-valuable that isn't direct currency. A work of art, or a commodity valuable on the open market.

descriptionTranslations.en: Something semi-valuable that isn't direct currency. A work of art, or a commodity valuable on the open market.

entries.description: Roll on the Special Elements table.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on the Special Elements table.

entries.description: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

descriptionTranslations.en: A mundane item that has some usefulness. Could be bought from any street merchant. Roll on Objects Meaning table for inspiration.

entries.description: Roll on Meaning Tables to interpret what the treasure is.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Meaning Tables to interpret what the treasure is.

entries.description: A non-magical weapon: sword, battle axe, dagger, or similar.

descriptionTranslations.en: A non-magical weapon: sword, battle axe, dagger, or similar.

entries.description: Roll again twice in this Category and use both results. If you get Roll Twice again, ignore it and roll again.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll again twice in this Category and use both results. If you get Roll Twice again, ignore it and roll again.

entries.description: A minor magic potion of some sort.

descriptionTranslations.en: A minor magic potion of some sort.

entries.description: Parchment with a spell written on it, for those who know what to do with it.

descriptionTranslations.en: Parchment with a spell written on it, for those who know what to do with it.

entries.description: An object that may look mundane but has magical properties. Roll on Objects Meaning table for what it is, and Actions tables for what it does.

descriptionTranslations.en: An object that may look mundane but has magical properties. Roll on Objects Meaning table for what it is, and Actions tables for what it does.

entries.description: A piece of armor that has been enchanted with minor magical properties.

descriptionTranslations.en: A piece of armor that has been enchanted with minor magical properties.

entries.description: A weapon that has been enchanted with minor magical properties.

descriptionTranslations.en: A weapon that has been enchanted with minor magical properties.

entries.description: A large stash of minor treasure. Roll 3 additional times in this Category and combine all results.

descriptionTranslations.en: A large stash of minor treasure. Roll 3 additional times in this Category and combine all results.
